message.const: Agent orchestration plan registry reference is missing.
Agent orchestration plan registry hash does not match generated registry evidence.
Agent orchestration plan selects an unregistered agent.
Agent task requires an unregistered capability.
Agent task requests a denied tool or side effect.
Agent task exceeds declared scope.
Agent work order exceeds declared scope.
Agent task declares hidden output.
Agent task review policy is blocked and cannot be promoted.
Agent orchestration plan contains a dependency cycle.
Agent orchestration plan references a missing dependency.
Agent orchestration plan contains a duplicate task id.
Agent orchestration plan contains a duplicate work-order id.
Agent orchestration plan contains a hidden handoff.
P3 upstream evidence input is missing.
P3 upstream evidence status is not pass.
P3 upstream evidence hash does not match the accepted boundary.
P3 upstream evidence boundary is stale.
Agent work requires review before execution.
Agent orchestration report plan hash does not match generated plan.
Agent orchestration evidence hash does not match the manifest or self-hash rule.

canonicalMessage.const: Agent orchestration plan registry reference is missing.

suggestedAction.const: Regenerate the orchestration plan from the current agent capability registry.

trigger.const: Orchestration plan omits its capability registry reference

canonicalMessage.const: Agent orchestration plan registry hash does not match generated registry evidence.

suggestedAction.const: Regenerate the orchestration plan from the current agent capability registry.

trigger.const: Orchestration plan registry hash differs from the generated registry

canonicalMessage.const: Agent orchestration plan selects an unregistered agent.

suggestedAction.const: Correct the P3 fixture or generated artifact and rerun the proof.

trigger.const: An orchestration plan or work order selects an agent id absent from the registry

canonicalMessage.const: Agent task requires an unregistered capability.

suggestedAction.const: Correct the P3 fixture or generated artifact and rerun the proof.

trigger.const: A task requires a capability absent from the registry

canonicalMessage.const: Agent task requests a denied tool or side effect.

suggestedAction.const: Correct the P3 fixture or generated artifact and rerun the proof.

trigger.const: A task or work order requests a denied tool, command, network, secret, or side effect

canonicalMessage.const: Agent task exceeds declared scope.

suggestedAction.const: Keep agent inputs and outputs inside the declared P3 artifact scope.

trigger.const: A task reads, writes, or emits outside declared artifact scope

canonicalMessage.const: Agent work order exceeds declared scope.

suggestedAction.const: Keep agent inputs and outputs inside the declared P3 artifact scope.

trigger.const: A generated work order reads, writes, or emits outside resolved artifact scope

canonicalMessage.const: Agent task declares hidden output.

suggestedAction.const: Keep agent inputs and outputs inside the declared P3 artifact scope.

trigger.const: A task declares hidden, untracked, or non-evidence output

canonicalMessage.const: Agent task review policy is blocked and cannot be promoted.

suggestedAction.const: Route the task to the non-executable review queue.

trigger.const: A task declares blocked review policy

canonicalMessage.const: Agent orchestration plan contains a dependency cycle.

suggestedAction.const: Correct the P3 fixture or generated artifact and rerun the proof.

trigger.const: Orchestration plan contains a dependency cycle

suggestedAction.const: Correct the P3 fixture or generated artifact and rerun the proof.

canonicalMessage.const: Agent orchestration plan contains a hidden handoff.

suggestedAction.const: Correct the P3 fixture or generated artifact and rerun the proof.

trigger.const: Orchestration plan contains a handoff not declared by task dependencies or evidence refs

canonicalMessage.const: P3 upstream evidence input is missing.

suggestedAction.const: Regenerate or restore the accepted P2 ingestion evidence and governed catalog before P3 proof continues.

trigger.const: Command-level upstream P2 evidence input is missing

canonicalMessage.const: P3 upstream evidence status is not pass.

suggestedAction.const: Regenerate or restore the accepted P2 ingestion evidence and governed catalog before P3 proof continues.

trigger.const: Command-level upstream P2 evidence is not passing

canonicalMessage.const: P3 upstream evidence hash does not match the accepted boundary.

suggestedAction.const: Regenerate or restore the accepted P2 ingestion evidence and governed catalog before P3 proof continues.

trigger.const: Command-level upstream P2 evidence or catalog hash does not match the accepted boundary

canonicalMessage.const: P3 upstream evidence boundary is stale.

suggestedAction.const: Regenerate or restore the accepted P2 ingestion evidence and governed catalog before P3 proof continues.

trigger.const: Command-level upstream P2 evidence or catalog ref is stale or not the exact declared input

canonicalMessage.const: Agent work requires review before execution.

suggestedAction.const: Route the task to the non-executable review queue.

trigger.const: A structurally valid task requires review before execution

canonicalMessage.const: Agent orchestration report plan hash does not match generated plan.

suggestedAction.const: Regenerate P3 proof artifacts from current inputs.

trigger.const: Orchestration report references a plan hash that differs from the current plan

suggestedAction.const: Regenerate P3 proof artifacts from current inputs.

trigger.const: Agent orchestration evidence hash differs from manifest or self-hash rule
